message:
ci: pin Zig to 0.16.0 (was "latest")

Mise's `zig = "latest"` produced different versions on different
machines — Mac picked up 0.16.0 while Linux was still on 0.15.2.
Conformance + bench passed under both, but reproducibility means
pinning to the version we actively develop against.

Both dev machines (Mac + ubuntu22) now resolve to 0.16.0; CI's
jdx/mise-action picks the same up automatically from this file.
Bump deliberately when upgrading.

files.patch:
@@ -1,2 +1,5 @@
 [tools]
-zig = "latest"
+# Pinned for reproducibility — `latest` produced different versions on
+# Mac (0.16.0) vs Linux (0.15.2) and conformance behaved differently
+# between them. Bump deliberately when upgrading.
+zig = "0.16.0"
